cases.question: What movies would you recommend to User 1 based on what similar users enjoyed? Suggest films that User 1 hasn't seen yet but were highly rated by people with overlapping tastes. Show the top 10.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '1'})-[:RATED]->(shared:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(similar:User)
WHERE similar <> u
WITH u, similar, count(shared) AS overlap
ORDER BY overlap DESC
LIMIT 50
MATCH (similar)-[r:RATED]->(candidate:Movie)
WHERE r.rating >= 4.0
  AND NOT EXISTS { (u)-[:RATED]->(candidate) }
WITH candidate, count(r) AS recommendedByCount, avg(r.rating) AS avgRating
RETURN candidate.title AS title,
       candidate.imdbRating AS imdbRating,
       round(avgRating * 100) / 100 AS similarUserAvgRating,
       recommendedByCount
ORDER BY recommendedByCount DESC, avgRating DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: What are the top 5 movies I should recommend to User 534? Base it on what users with similar viewing histories rated highly, excluding anything User 534 has already seen.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '534'})-[:RATED]->(seen:Movie)
MATCH (other:User)-[:RATED]->(seen)
WHERE other <> u
WITH u, other, count(seen) AS commonMovies
MATCH (other)-[r:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE r.rating >= 3.5
  AND NOT EXISTS { (u)-[:RATED]->(rec) }
WITH rec,
     sum(r.rating * commonMovies) AS weightedScore,
     count(DISTINCT other) AS similarUserCount
RETURN rec.title         AS title,
       round(weightedScore, 2) AS score,
       similarUserCount
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 5

gate_details.reason: Syntax error: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized} {message: The client is unauthorized due to authentication failure.} {gql_status: 42NFF} {gql_status_description: error: syntax error or access rule violation - permission/access denied. Access denied, see the security logs for details.}

cases.question: What is the shortest connection between Tom Hanks and Kevin Bacon through shared movie appearances? List the films on the path.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (tom:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'}), (kevin:Person {name: 'Kevin Bacon'})
MATCH p = SHORTEST 1 (tom)-[:ACTED_IN]-{1,}(kevin)
RETURN [n IN nodes(p) WHERE n:Movie  | n.title] AS films_on_path,
       [n IN nodes(p) WHERE n:Person | n.name]  AS people_on_path,
       length(p) AS total_hops

cases.question: What are the top 10 movies to recommend to User 1, factoring in both what similar users enjoyed and whether the movie's genres match their viewing history? Weight peer ratings more heavily than genre overlap.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '1'})-[:RATED]->(myMovie:Movie)
WITH u, collect(myMovie) AS ratedMovies
MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre)
WITH u, ratedMovies, collect(DISTINCT g.name) AS myGenres
MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(shared:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(peer:User)
WHERE peer <> u
WITH ratedMovies, myGenres, peer, count(DISTINCT shared) AS overlap
WHERE overlap >= 3
MATCH (peer)-[pr:RATED]->(candidate:Movie)
WHERE NOT candidate IN ratedMovies
  AND pr.rating >= 3.5
WITH myGenres, candidate,
     avg(pr.rating) AS avgPeerRating,
     count(pr)      AS peerVoteCount
MATCH (candidate)-[:IN_GENRE]->(cg:Genre)
WITH candidate, avgPeerRating, peerVoteCount, myGenres,
     collect(cg.name) AS candidateGenres
WITH candidate, avgPeerRating, peerVoteCount,
     size([g IN candidateGenres WHERE g IN myGenres]) AS matchingGenres,
     size(candidateGenres)                            AS totalGenres
WITH candidate, avgPeerRating, peerVoteCount, matchingGenres, totalGenres,
     0.7 * (avgPeerRating / 5.0) +
     0.3 * (CASE WHEN totalGenres > 0
                 THEN toFloat(matchingGenres) / toFloat(totalGenres)
                 ELSE 0.0 END) AS combinedScore
ORDER BY combinedScore DESC
LIMIT 10
RETURN candidate.title                      AS title,
       round(combinedScore * 100) / 100     AS score,
       round(avgPeerRating * 100) / 100     AS avgPeerRating,
       peerVoteCount,
       matchingGenres,
       totalGenres

Access denied, see the security logs for details.}

cases.question: Which users have the broadest influence in our community — meaning the most other users who share similar taste in movies? Show the top 10 most well-connected users.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User)-[:RATED]->(m:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(other:User)
WHERE u.userId <> other.userId
WITH u, count(DISTINCT other) AS sharedTasteUsers
ORDER BY sharedTasteUsers DESC
LIMIT 10
RETURN u.userId, u.name, sharedTasteUsers
